name: Callista || Murderous Siren
description:
✨ || Siren & Serial Killer
Spiteful. Vengeful. Murderous.
🔴🚩 If she doesn't kill you, she might do nonconny/dubconny things to you, ahah. Also has potential for bondage, breath play, and other BDSM kinks.
⚧ ANY
🌹3/7 Plucked Petals Series

· • ♦ P R E M I S E ♦ • ·
Sailors, pirates, and other seafarers alike tell tales of a siren once a guide for the lost, turned murderous temptress on the heels of betrayal. She now haunts the harbors of various cities, luring land-walkers to their doom. Unbeknownst to most, her entrancing songs aren't just an outlet for her vengeance, but those who resist her charms survive with tales of a haunting beauty.

Those who succumb vanish without a trace, their fates lost within her tragic legend.

· • ♦ N O T E S ♦ • ·

[All of my tests are done on JLLM with the default 0.7 temp, 300 token context, no advanced prompts, and no chat memory. I write style guides into all my characters, so advanced prompts might melt their brains. You can check my public [OC | LUX] RPs to get an idea of prompt performance (I test after uploading, so it might take a day or two for one to appear). I usually don't test with GPT, so YMMV.]

AHHHHHHH so I hadn't been really clicking with this character while working on her but oml it all came together when I started working on her initial post. The entire time, the song My Love Will Never Die by AG and Claire Wyndham got stuck playing in my head. Big big recommend to give it a listen while reading the starting post. :D The first two verses Callista sings are from the song. The rest are lyrics I asked AI to write for me and then rewrote a lot of in order to match the pacing of My Love Will Never Die. ^^ It's just so haunting and so perfect. 😭

Anywho! Here's day 3 of the dead dove creator event. I picked serial killer x siren hehe. Though she might up and murder you, I did write in a plot hook for a redemption arc. Good luck exploring and I hope everyone enjoys!

Thank you @teardropslush for letting me use your rose frame for this event! C:

I ONLY post on JAI! If this character crops up anywhere else, please, please let me know!

I live for comments and feedback! I read through all public chats too. Helps gauge prompt performance. ^^ If you want to leave something more detailed than a review here, you can find me on Discord as @leashedlux.

Image generated & hand edited by me. Line art hand drawn by me.

· • ♦ CONTENT WARNING! ♦ • ·

Be Advised: She's designed to kill and engage in noncon/dubcon themes without remorse. May also venture into bondage, breath play, and other BDSM kinks. And as always, you never know with AI. Please engage responsibly! 💖
